string.text: Free zoom and ADS stack (hip FOV Г— ADS% Г— free-zoom%). Toggle / zoom in / out / scroll. Optical scopes own their FOV; free zoom is blocked there. Iron ADS can free-zoom; scroll passes through on optical for scope zoom.
Turn free zoom on or off. Turning off restores hip FOV immediately.
Flip free zoom on or off. Works hip or ADS (stacks with ADS%). Blocked on optical scopes.
Turn free zoom on (stacks with ADS if aiming). Blocked on optical scopes.
Turn free zoom off. ADS stays at ADS% if still aiming.
Scroll up zooms in, scroll down zooms out (hip or iron ADS). Optical scopes keep normal scroll for zoom steps. PDA and inventory keep normal scroll.
Swap scroll up/down for free zoom.
How many scroll notches in the same direction (within the gap time) before zoom in or out. Raise this for twitchy mice. Default: 1
Max time between scroll notches that still count toward one zoom. Older notches drop. Default: 200 ms
Extra FOV shrink while free zooming. Stacks with ADS% (hip Г— ADS Г— free). 0% = none. Default: 40%
Iron-sight FOV shrink when you aim. Free zoom stacks on top. Optical scopes are left alone. Default: 15%
Slow walk while free zooming (sprint uses a milder share of the same setting). 0% = no slowdown. Default: 40%
Write free zoom events to the game log (zoom changes, blocked actions, ADS, GUI, death).
